name: @moolam/benchmarks
description: Microbenchmarks for the cognitive infrastructure: CRDT merge throughput, memory retrieval latency, sync engine round-trip, and core loop overhead.

scripts.all: node crdt_merge.bench.mjs && node memory_retrieval.bench.mjs && node sync_roundtrip.bench.mjs && node core_loop.bench.mjs && node router.bench.mjs && node agent_turn.bench.mjs && node load/sync_convergence.bench.mjs
scripts.test: node --test gates/thresholds.test.mjs gates/check.runner.test.mjs gates/check.baseline.test.mjs gates/ci_job.test.mjs gates/record_baseline.test.mjs gates/prove_gate.test.mjs gates/router.bench.test.mjs gates/agent_turn.bench.test.mjs gates/sync_convergence.bench.test.mjs gates/concurrent_load.test.mjs gates/soak_leak.test.mjs gates/sync_chaos.test.mjs gates/sync_chaos_partition.test.mjs gates/sync_chaos_checkpoint.test.mjs gates/sync_chaos_invariants.test.mjs gates/degradation_drills.test.mjs gates/degradation_registry_crossref.test.mjs gates/wire_python.test.mjs
